message:
feat(python): numpy.cross wrapper parity (franken_numpy-g3qs)

Add fnp_python.cross(a, b, axisa=-1, axisb=-1, axisc=-1, axis=None)
as a passthrough delegator to np.cross preserving the cross-product
result for 2-D and 3-D vectors, axisa/axisb/axisc per-input axis
selectors, the overriding `axis` shorthand, and broadcasting
semantics across real and complex inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with six scenarios: 3-D × 3-D
(basic), standard basis e1 × e2, anticommutativity verification
(a × b == -(b × a)), stacked input broadcasting, explicit
axis=0 shorthand on row-vector-along-axis-0 stacked inputs, and
complex128 3-D vector cross.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
